svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.10 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1" scale="4" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="2946" dy="1200" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="swimlane;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="用户输入层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="160" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="系统提示词框架" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="10" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="图片输入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="10" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="语音输入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="10" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="文本输入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="10" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="相关文档输入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="10" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="swimlane;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="多模态理解层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="180" (VLM/ASR/OCR)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="8" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="统一文本表示" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="15" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11"
